statement.en: Dynamic analysis of non-smooth contact in bladed disk root joints via an equality-based frequency domain method

proposer: Sophia McDonald, C. Legrand, Christophe Pierre

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future date suggesting provisional status) in computational mechanics with novel methodology. The equality-based frequency domain method for non-smooth contact dynamics is not yet peer-validated. The technical approach appears sound but requires publication confirmation and empirical validation on physical systems.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 滑らかさの喪失が振動数領域で跳躍を生む。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 接触と離別が振動の渦を刻み、周波数の十字が引き裂かれる。
